title: AttestationEnvelopeV6
description: RFC-0042 §Design Layer 4 — per-PR proof bundle. Carries per-reviewer transcript hashes, per-leaf Merkle inclusion proofs, the operator-signed root, and the PR-bound nonce. Replaces v5 envelopes (contentHashV3/V4/V5) during RFC-0042 Phase 2.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version — always 'v6' for this schema.

subject.description: The Git commit this envelope attests to.

sha1.description: Git commit SHA (40 hex chars) this envelope is bound to.

transcriptLeaves.description: Summary of each reviewer's transcript leaf included in this PR's proof bundle.

transcriptHash.description: SHA-256 hex of the raw reviewer transcript JSONL file.

merkleProofs.description: Per-leaf RFC-6962 Merkle inclusion proofs. Each proof is a sibling-hash path from leaf level to (but not including) the root.

leafIndex.description: 0-based position of the leaf this proof attests to.

proof.description: Ordered list of sibling SHA-256 hashes from leaf level to root.

rootHash.description: SHA-256 Merkle root over all leaves in .ai-sdlc/transcript-leaves.jsonl at sign time.

rootSignature.description: Operator ed25519 signature over rootHash (base64-encoded). Verified against any key in .ai-sdlc/trusted-reviewers.yaml (any-of-N per OQ-4).

nonce.description: 32-byte hex nonce bound to the PR's head SHA (replay protection). Derived from SHA-256(headSha || random) per RFC-0042 §Nonce binding (OQ-6).

leafCount.description: Total number of leaves in the tree at sign time. Required by verifyInclusion to reject out-of-bounds leafIndex (CVE-2012-2459 second-preimage mitigation).

signerIdentity.description: Free-form identity string of the key holder who signed (typically email:hostname). Informational; not verified.

signedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this envelope was signed.
